scripts.format: prettier --write .prettierrc.json CHANGELOG.md eslint.config.mjs package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json config/toolchain docs/adr/0001-foundation-toolchain.md apps packages infra/cdk
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .prettierrc.json CHANGELOG.md eslint.config.mjs package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json turbo.json config/toolchain docs/adr/0001-foundation-toolchain.md apps packages infra/cdk
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
